programs.title: Married At First Sight: Episode
programs.desc: Strangers are matched by experts and marry upon first meeting, embarking on a high-stakes social experiment. Couples navigate relationships, intimacy, and conflict while living together and attending commitment ceremonies. Through challenges and partner swaps, their compatibility is tested, leading to dramatic outcomes and final decisions.

programs.title: Married At First Sight Uk
programs.desc: (M) The group reunite for one last explosive dinner party! As speculation spirals, hidden truths are finally exposed. But, one bride's need for answers throws the night into turmoil!
